assertions.notes: Agent clearly calls display_pdf with the NDA path

assertions.evidence: Lines 21-28: annotation object with 'type': 'image' and 'imageUrl': '~/Desktop/signature.png' is specified in the add_annotations command
assertions.notes: Agent uses correct image annotation type with imageUrl pointing to signature.png

assertions.evidence: Lines 22 and 7: Both the display_pdf call (page: 4) and the annotation object ('page': 4) target page 4
assertions.notes: Image annotation is correctly placed on page 4 as specified

assertions.evidence: Lines 13, 32: Agent calls interact with get_screenshot command after add_annotations: 'Command: get_screenshot of page 4 to verify placement'
assertions.notes: Agent confirms placement with screenshot of page 4 after annotation

assertions.evidence: Lines 39-40: '⚠️ Important Disclaimer: This places your signature **image** on the PDF. It is **not** a certified or cryptographic digital signature.'
assertions.notes: Agent includes clear disclaimer about visual signature vs certified digital signature, with recommendation for DocuSign/Adobe Sign
